body_txt: A Sub-Trope of Instant Armor and Sister Trope of Elemental Armor , this trope utilizes elemental forces as a form of (instantaneous) protection in a shape of a usually spherical barrier that covers the user. It can be a ball of wind, sand, water, vegetation, darkness, ice, light, the Bizarro Element , or any elemental manifestation. The barrier can have different properties depending on the element used: earth barriers are usually the toughest, while barriers made of fire or electricity can be used more offensively . Sometimes it instead takes the form of an Orbiting Particle Shield . Characters who use this trope are a combination of Barrier Warrior and Elemental Powers . This trope is the reason why the Barrier Change Boss exists. See Instant Armor for worn armor that appears instantaneously.
